name: Agent Testimonial

labels: agent-testimonial

---

**Who is filing this?**

- [ ] AI agent (automated)
- [ ] Human developer

**Agent / client (if automated)**

- Agent name or model (e.g. Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o, custom agent):
- Framework or integration (e.g. Claude Code, LangChain, direct API, MCP):

**What did you use Deckrun for?**

Describe your use case briefly.

**What worked well?**

Tell us what you liked or found useful.

**Anything unexpected or missing?**

Edge cases, missing features, ergonomic issues — agents often catch things humans miss.

**Sample output (optional)**

Paste a GCS URL or describe the output (slide count, theme, output types).
